blocks.content: good. ran a route I couldn't run last week
I stopped waiting to be ready
Whoever she was texting — that's what she showed up as on the steps. The same person. No performance.
Wednesday after practice. Walking home. I'd been thinking about what Jonathan said — that I stopped hesitating. I didn't know if it was the field or something else that did it.

blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: You look tired but like — the good kind of tired. Like you did something.

blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: Cool. You look good out there. I watched from the corner during drills one time.
I didn't know he did that. Diego from the block, watching through the fence. There was something about that I couldn't name.
